title: dryopteris ilicifolia
intro: Dryopteris ilicifolia, also known as Holly Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is native to the eastern parts of North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Holly Fern are used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, with its health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Holly Fern can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
